issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Call requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter#ofPattern`
issue.errorLine1: private val timestampFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM dd, yyyy • HH:mm")
